description:
Advances: specled.append_only

Deliverable:
Ship the pure AppendOnly module with all 10 detectors, the fixture builder used by its test suite, and the `normalize_for_state/1` refactor that gives AppendOnly (and tests) a canonical shape for `state.json` payloads.

Concrete additions:
- new module `SpecLedEx.AppendOnly` with public `analyze(prior_state, current_state, decisions, opts) :: [finding]` and 10 internal detectors (requirement_deleted, must_downgraded, scenario_regression, negative_removed, disabled_without_reason, no_baseline, adr_affects_widened, same_pr_self_authorization, missing_change_type, decision_deleted).
- extract `SpecLedEx.normalize_for_state/1` from existing code in lib/specled_ex.ex or lib/specled_ex/state.ex; pure function, contract-tested, no behavior change to current callers.
- new `test/support/append_only_fixtures.ex` with `state_fixture/1`, `requirement/2`, `scenario/1`, `adr/1` per T4.
- new `test/specled_ex/append_only_test.exs` with ~24 per-detector x authorization-outcome cases through the fixture builder.
- update `.spec/specs/append_only.spec.md` spec-verification stubs: flip execute: false -> execute: true for the test-file targets.

Verification:
- Tests to pass: mix test test/specled_ex/append_only_test.exs test/specled_ex_test.exs
- Behaviors to demonstrate (from append_only.spec.md):
  - requirement_deleted (unauthorized vs. authorized paths)
  - must_downgraded (must -> should, must -> none, must -> must_not)
  - scenario_regression (count drop triggers)
  - negative_removed (polarity: negative disappears)
  - disabled_without_reason (execute: false without reason:)
  - no_baseline (prior :missing -> exactly one :info, no other findings)
  - adr_affects_widened (affects change on accepted ADR)
  - same_pr_self_authorization (ADR new in diff self-authorizing a removal)
  - missing_change_type (ADR referenced by authorization lookup without change_type)
  - decision_deleted (ADR id absent from current state)
  - identity property (analyze(s, s, []) == [])
  - findings_sorted (output sorted by {subject_id, entity_id, code})
  - fix_block_discipline (every message ends with code-fenced fix: block)
- Merge gate: T1 round-trip invariant - normalize_for_state(index) == Jason.decode!(File.read!(write_state(...))) over a fixture corpus. Add as a test in test/specled_ex_test.exs.
- Property tests: identity (T8 #2), bootstrap (T8 #3), CrossField idempotence (T8 #4) - idempotence may live in W1's CrossField test file.

Out of Scope (files):
- lib/specled_ex/overlap.ex (W2b)
- lib/specled_ex/branch_check.ex (W2b)
- lib/specled_ex/config.ex (W3)
- lib/mix/tasks/spec.check.ex (W3)
- .spec/specs/overlap.spec.md (W2b flips its stubs)

Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- lib/specled_ex/append_only.ex (new)
- lib/specled_ex.ex (normalize_for_state/1 extraction, no behavior change to other callers)
- test/support/append_only_fixtures.ex (new)
- test/specled_ex/append_only_test.exs (new)
- test/specled_ex_test.exs (round-trip invariant gate)
- .spec/specs/append_only.spec.md (flip verification execute: true)

Out of Scope (intent):
- Do not wire AppendOnly into BranchCheck.run/3 yet (W2b owns that wiring).
- Do not add the `Spec-Drift:` trailer override integration test (W2b).
- Do not touch severity defaults or config-driven severity overrides (W3).
- Do not introduce git I/O into AppendOnly; the module is pure over two state payloads plus a decisions list.
- Do not add any finding code not in the 12 ratified by specled.decision.append_only_finding_budget.
- Do not cache modal_class on requirements or in state.json (see specled.decision.modal_class_diff_time).

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] Tests listed above pass
- [ ] T1 round-trip invariant test green
- [ ] R1.f message-format test green (every append_only/* finding ends with fix: block)
- [ ] findings-sort contract test green
- [ ] Spec verification passes for specled.append_only subject
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket

Must land together with W2b on the feature branch before merging to main (user directive 2026-04-23). Do not open a PR to main from W2a alone.
title: W2a: AppendOnly module + fixture builder + normalize_for_state
